Headline: #60 Blue Island/26th Temporary Eastbound Reroute near 26th/Rockwell
ShortDescription: EB 60 Blue Island/26th buses are temp. rerouted, due to street blockage near 26th/Rockwell.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Eastbound #60 Blue Island/26th buses are temporarily rerouted via 26th, California, Cermak, Western, Blue Island, and over normal route, due to street blockage near 26th/Rockwell.

Westbound buses are not affected.

Allow extra travel time.
